concerns.text: Task T018 implements StarCoder for Python only, but FR-013 mandates 'JaCoText model for Java code generation AND StarCoder model for Python'. No task implements JaCoText, silently weakening the FR.

Task T012 sources HumanEval from HuggingFace (https://huggingface.co/datasets/openai_humaneval) and Codeforces from UCI/datasets.load_dataset(). Constitution VI requires 'GitHub for HumanEval, public Codeforces API'. This violates Benchmark Integrity.

Tasks follow plan's decision to run experiment on 'separate server' (plan.md:Compute Feasibility Decision). Constitution I requires 'Every result...reproducible by re-running the project's code/ against data/ on a fresh GitHub Actions runner'. Experiment execution must be on GitHub Actions.

Tasks omit implementation of Reference-Validator Agent and Advancement-Evaluator Agent mandated by Constitution (Verified Accuracy Gate, Governance sections). These are blocking gates for artifact transitions.
Task T015 validates problem complexity but does not address FR-001's ≥95% successful problem loading rate requirement. Acceptance criterion for FR-001 is dropped from verification steps.
